Shopify CEO Tobi Lütke: AI is now a ‘fundamental expectation’ for employeesLütke says managers asking for new human talent will have to explain why the job can’t be done by AI. - Fast Company

In Maui, architects are turning surfboard waste into new housingHawaii Off Grid is using foam scraps to make insulated blocks for housing—a solution that's actually stronger and more energy efficient than the original. - Fast Company
Redbox goes up for auction following a wild bankruptcy sagaThe assets of the defunct DVD rental outlet and related companies are being sold later this month. - Fast Company
Kentucky floods: Buffalo Trace Distillery temporarily closesAs of Monday, the lower levels of several Buffalo Trace buildings were flooded, putting parking lots and cars underwater. - Fast Company
Europe considers new tariffs that could punish tech companies like Google, Meta, and Apple - Fast Company
Take a look inside Delta’s new 24,000-square-foot Sky Club lounge in Atlanta - Fast Company
58 housing markets where inventory has spiked, and homebuyers have gained power - Fast Company
This is the big-ticket item that Americans are rushing to buy before Trump’s tariffs kick in - Fast Company
The power of smart designThree experts weigh in on how designers are responding to—and embracing—technology - Fast Company
Design Within Reach - Fast Company
Need a break from doomscrolling the news? Try this addictive chicken rating websiteCan you tell a cunning chicken from a sly chicken? This website will help you find out. - Fast Company

‘I'm going to go down swinging’: Meet the Florida entrepreneur taking on Trump’s tariffs in courtEmily Ley has become the face of a high stakes legal battle with sweeping implications for the global economy. - Fast Company
He played football at MIT. Now he’s designing a lighter, safer helmet - Fast Company
My dog recognizes the sounds a Waymo car makes - Fast Company
'No species has ever created another species': Baratunde Thurston on the future of being human with AI - Fast Company
How Helsinki ditched coal in just 2 years - Fast Company
Women dominate online influencing. So why are they paid less than men? - Fast Company
Phineas and Ferb are making a mischievous return, targeting multiple generations of fans - Fast Company
California now has more EV chargers than gas pumps - Fast Company
The secret to a successful job search? An accountability buddy - Fast Company
Vapes aren’t just for smoking anymore—now they’re digital toys - Fast Company
This DTC-era darling has a plan for navigating Trump's tariffs - Fast Company
Bill Gates isn’t the first billionaire to try to save the world—and he’ll fail for the same reasons the robber barons did - Fast Company
How to unlock more time in your day - Fast Company
3 years into war with Russia, this Ukrainian startup is powering a drone revolution - Fast Company
How Hebbia is building AI for in-depth research - Fast Company
Inside J.Crew's strategy to be at the 'center of culture' - Fast Company
Recruiters who hire celebrity assistants explain how they pick engaged employees - Fast Company
Trump wants to slash funding for science research—but it will hurt the entire economy - Fast Company
Why Canadian brands are going all-in on 'Elbows Up' - Fast Company
Shipping is terrible for the environment—but it could be headed for a reckoning - Fast Company
'Hands Off' protests drew hundreds of thousands of people who decried Trump's attacks on democracy - Fast Company
Flooding in Tennessee and central U.S. hits levels rarely seen in the last 200 years - Fast Company
Fossil fuels are terrible for the environment. Is mining critical minerals any better? - Fast Company
As tornados and flooding hit the U.S., Trump is ending a program that helps cities prepare for disasters - Fast Company
Why creators are now a boardroom priority The rise of creators is part of a bigger cultural shift, and brands can’t afford to ignore it. - Fast Company

Mega Millions tickets just got more expensive—but winning the jackpot is easierA new built-in multiplier and a $50M starting jackpot are among the biggest changes to the popular lottery. - Fast Company
'The White Lotus' characters would never survive Trump's tariffsThe white-hot HBO show underlines most people's unwillingness to give up material comfort. - Fast Company
Jack Black's SNL Cheetos sketch is brand spoof brillianceFlamin' Hot x Preparation H? A match made in comedy heaven. - Fast Company
Navigating Climate Policy Under Trump - Fast Company

Venezuelans in Miami fear deportation after Trump administration ends legal protectionsVenezuelans who lose their protections would have to remain illegally at the risk of being deported or return home. - Fast Company
Minecraft topples Mario with historic box office weekendWhile reviews were mixed, audiences still showed up in droves for the game-to-screen hit. - Fast Company
Trump's tariffs put the squeeze on NYC's Economy CandyEconomy Candy was already feeling the weight of surges in prices of cocoa and other ingredients before tariffs were layered on. - Fast Company
PRESENTED BY ORACLE - Fast Company

How AI agents are shaping the future of financeFinance and accounting leaders are banking on embedded predictive, generative, and agentic AI capabilities to power automation, insights, and efficiency - Fast Company

The Dodgers are visiting Trump at the White House today—and ‘Jackie Robinson would be outraged’The World Series champions, whose franchise integrated baseball, have angered some by accepting Trump’s invitation to the White House. - Fast Company

SpaceX tourists return to Earth after a private trip that orbited the polesThe trip, paid for by Bitcoin investor Chun Wang, lasted 3 1/2 days and provided 360-degree views of the polar caps. - Fast Company

Chevron destroyed Louisiana wetlands—and now it must pay $740 million to clean them upThe Louisiana jury's verdict could set a precedent leaving Big Oil responsible for the environmental degradation it causes. - Fast Company

Trump scraps Biden’s plan to cover Wegovy and Zepbound through MedicareThe Trump administration scrapped a plan proposed by Joe Biden that would have extended coverage of Zepbound and Wegovy. - Fast Company

‘The worst I've ever seen it’: Kentucky and Tennessee are reeling from floods after unrelenting rainDays of heavy, unrelenting rain in the U.S. South and Midwest caused some rivers to rise to near record levels. - Fast Company

Trump's tariffs will make almost everything you wear more expensive. Here's whyU.S. trade groups say that if tariffs on Asian manufacturers persist, price hikes will find their way to consumers. - Fast Company

Debunking four common myths of founding a successful startupThese four common myths derail startups and keep them from bringing their innovative visions to life. But here's the reality. - Fast Company

The AI shopping revolution: How agentic e-commerce is reshaping brand strategyAI agents are now making purchasing decisions. If you're not optimizing for AI search, there's a good chance your traffic and revenue will decline before you even realize what's happening. - Fast Company
Markets tumble again as Trump tariffs spark fears of 'economic nuclear war'Both J.P. Morgan and Goldman Sachs say the risk of a global recession is climbing. - Fast Company
Let’s connect async: How to build a better asynchronous cultureDone properly, an asynchronous work culture can be extraordinarily beneficial. Here's what leaders should know. - Fast Company
Behind the scenes: How your PR agency drives business resultsYour PR team is simultaneously working on today’s brand image while also building the one five years from now. - Fast Company
Six steps to negotiate a high salary even in a tough job marketIt’s hard out there, but that doesn’t mean you can’t still get paid what you’re worth. Here’s exactly how. - Fast Company
What’s behind the rise in interim CEOsHigh turnover in the C-suite and the changing needs of business are leading to more “temps” in the top job. - Fast Company

Losing your top talent to your competitors? 3 easy strategies to hold on to themBeyond offering good salaries, action is needed to build the organizational cultures people want to be a part of, and stop losing top talent. - Fast Company
Your boss is overwhelmed—here’s how to work with them, not against themJust because your boss is overwhelmed doesn’t mean your growth has to stall. - Fast Company

Home services company Thumbtack is thriving even as the real estate market stays slowThe platform is transforming how homeowners connect with pros—and carving out a lead in a fragmented, $500 billion industry. - Fast Company

This city in Central Asia is an unexpected goldmine of modernist architectureThe demolition of one modernist building in Tashkent, Uzbekistan, led to a citywide preservation effort that is saving the city's heritage. - Fast Company
China is designing a silent supersonic airplane to win the next era of commercial flightBeijing knows that it needs to take over commercial aviation. Supersonic flight is key to that. - Fast Company

Planned Parenthood’s Alexis McGill Johnson on resistance and resolveWith attacks on funding mounting in South Carolina, Texas, and beyond, McGill Johnson shares how she stays grounded—and how she rallies her team to keep showing up. - Fast Company
